name: Peoples Bank
description_short: Mendenhall's Peoples Bank branch at 160 E Maud Ave offers personal and business banking services in MS.
description_long:
The Peoples Bank branch in Mendenhall, MS is located at 160 E Maud Ave, serving the local community as a standalone banking location. As a dedicated branch facility in Mendenhall, this location provides standard banking services for residents and businesses throughout the area. While specific hours are not currently published, customers can contact the branch directly for current operating hours.

At the Peoples Bank location in Mendenhall, customers can access a range of banking services including deposit accounts, loan products, and financial advisory services. Staff at this Mendenhall branch are available to assist with account opening, transfers, and other banking needs. For specific details about services or to speak with a representative, customers are encouraged to call the branch.

Visiting the 160 E Maud Ave branch in Mendenhall is convenient for locals who prefer in-person banking. Bring a valid ID and any relevant account information when visiting. Peoples Bank serves the Mendenhall community with personalized service and financial solutions.
